chapters.text: Upa keiman thutah a ka-ngailut kangai Gaius hengah.
Ngai, nalhagao phattheina achan banga chu imalam jousea naphat theiya nadamna dingin kataojie.
Sopite ho ahunguva nakitah je le thutah a nachon thudol eihung hettohsah jeh-un kakipah behseh jenge.
Kachate thutah a achon thu kajah a kakipa sanga chungnungjo kakipana dang aumpoi.
Ngai, nangman het phah lou maljin sopiho nahin bolna chu tahsan nei chonna doltah ahi;
amahon nangma ngailutna thudol chu Houbungah ahetsah-un ahi. Nangman amaho chu Pathena doltah-in ajin nauva anathahji le chun pha lheh ding ahi;
ijeh-inem itile amahon chidang namdang hoa kona imacha kilah louva Min jal’a chu hung pot jeng ahiuve.
Hijeh a chu thutah kithopi ihi theina dinguva hite ho tobang mi chu eiho tah-in ilhunsah dingu thu ahi.
Keiman ilouthem khat Houbunga kahinsutsa ahi, ahinla alah uva piput ngailua Diotrephes chun kaseiyu alapon ahi.

Hichejeh a chu keima kahunga ahile athilbol achonna thu gilou tamtah kachunguva aseiya eiseiset nau chengse kageldohsah ding ahi; chua jong chu lung lhai loulaiyin sopiho chu amanla alhunsah pon, lhunsah dinga gohoma ajadan, Houbunga konin anodoh jengin ahi.
Ngai nangma vangin ase chu jom louvin apha chu jomin. Apha bola chu Pathena kon ahi; ase bol’a vang chun Pathen amu loulai ahi.
Demetrius chun mijouse hettohsahna aneiya, thutah jongin ahettohsah ahin, keihon jong kahettohsah jengu ahi; chule keiho hettohsah chu thutah ahi ti nangman nahei.
Nangma henga hinsut ding thil tamtah aume, ahinla lekha twi le lekha mol a hinsut ding kanompoi;
ahin chomkhat jou le nangma kamua chule kimaitoa ikihoulim ding kakineme. Nachungah lungmon chuhen. Gol le paihon nasalamui. Gol le paiho chu amin cheh phan salamin.
